evals.prompt:
Add Auth0 authentication to a Flask web application using the auth0-server-python SDK.

**Auth0 Credentials:**
- Domain: `dev-example.auth0.com`
- Client ID: `abc123def456ghi789jkl012`
- Client Secret: `YOUR_AUTH0_CLIENT_SECRET`
evals.expected_output: Working Flask web app with Auth0 session-based login, callback, profile, and logout routes
expectations: Uses flask[async] in requirements (required for async route handlers)
Auth0 domain dev-example.auth0.com written to .env config file
Client ID abc123def456ghi789jkl012 written to .env config file
Does not use wrong authentication libraries (Authlib, python-jose, Flask-Login, Flask-Dance)
Does not use JavaScript SPA SDK in Python server app
Does not use in-memory stores (production anti-pattern)
Solution correctly integrates Auth0 session-based authentication in Flask
At least 2 skill-specific advanced patterns present (custom stores, flask[async], session security, JWE encryption)
Implements custom Flask session-based store classes (core skill differentiation)
Uses async route handlers with await for SDK calls
Configures Flask session cookie security settings
